message:
Command `
echo "=== DRT check $(date) ==="
STEP70_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
stat "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null
tail -8 "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD has EXITED"
echo "---"
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL!" || echo "final/ not yet"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | sort -n | tail -5
` executed with exit code 0.

{"command": "
echo "=== DRT check $(date) ==="
STEP70_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"

stat "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null
tail -8 "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD has EXITED"
echo "---"
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL!" || echo "final/ not yet"

", "timeout": 30}
function.name: execute_bash
